description_long: This object consists of two standard traffic cones, each featuring a tall, conical shape with a wide square base for stability. The cones are primarily orange with two broad white horizontal stripes encircling the upper and middle sections, both of which appear somewhat faded and dirty from use. The surface of the cones shows visible scuff marks, dirt, and signs of wear, indicating they have been used outdoors, likely on roads or construction sites. The tips of the cones are hollow and slightly rounded, with a small circular opening at the top. The bases are thick, flat, and slightly beveled at the edges, with a textured, worn appearance and some discoloration from dirt. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any part of the cones.
description: A pair of worn orange traffic cones with white stripes, scuffed surfaces, and thick, square bases. The cones show visible dirt and wear, with hollow, rounded tips and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Two traffic cones side by side, showing their broad white stripes and scuffed, dirty surfaces on the front and sides.
description_view_1: The cones are viewed at an angle, highlighting the hollow tips and the thickness of the square bases.
description_view_2: A rear view of the cones, emphasizing the faded stripes and the worn, dirty appearance of the bases.
description_view_3: The cones are seen from a different angle, with the white stripes and orange color clearly visible, and the hollow tips facing forward.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has two wide, horizontal white stripes encircling the upper and middle sections. The stripes are faded and dirty, but still distinct.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is hollow, slightly rounded, and orange, with a small circular opening at the top and no attachments.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, thick, and flat with beveled edges, made of the same orange plastic as the cone, and shows visible dirt and wear for added stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the cones.
attribute_condition: The cones are worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks, fading, and signs of outdoor use.
